title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 21-B.  LOUISIANA HISTORIC CEMETERY

PRESERVATION ACT

§931.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known as the "Louisiana Historic Cemetery  Preservation Act".

Acts 2010, No. 707, §1, eff. June 29, 2010.
